summary:
Given a non-negative integer n, produce an array of length n + 1 where the value at each index i is the number of 1 bits in the binary representation of i.

The goal is to build the whole array efficiently, ideally in a single linear pass rather than counting bits from scratch for each number.
constraints: The output array has length n + 1
Element i equals the number of set bits in i
A linear-time, single-pass solution is expected
